case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HEALTH CARE AND REHAB, INC. VS. JOHN IRONS ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-18-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-18-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT JOHN IRONS WHO WAS NOT PRESENT AT TODAYS HEARING. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY SEVEN HU--BUSINESS OFFICE MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HEALTH CARE AND REHAB, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IRONS, JOHN $7,015.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,240.00, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT, CATHY GIFFORD, IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
